Two-Stage Model Architecture
📦
Input
150 features
Site × GL × Week
→
🎯
Stage 1
XGBClassifier
binary:logistic
P(recovery > 0)
→
📈
Stage 2
XGBRegressor
logit(rate) target
E(rate | >0)
→
✅
Output
Final rate
= P₁ × E₂
5 recovery tiers
Final rate = P(recovery > 0) × E(rate | recovery > 0)
2
Model Configuration
Stage 1 — XGBClassifier
ParameterValue
objectivebinary:logistic
n_estimators2000
max_depth6
learning_rate0.1
subsample / colsample_bytree0.8 / 0.8
min_child_weight1
gamma / reg_α / reg_λ0 / 0 / 1
scale_pos_weight1.55  (neg/pos ratio)
tree_methodhist
enable_categoricalTrue
early_stopping_rounds50 (on logloss)
eval_metricauc, aucpr, logloss

Stage 2 — XGBRegressor
ParameterValue

n_estimators2000
max_depth6
learning_rate0.1

min_child_weight1
gamma / reg_α / reg_λ0 / 0 / 1
target transformlogit(rate) → sigmoid
sample weights1× / 3× / 8× / 2×
tree_methodhist
enable_categoricalTrue
